content: {"key_findings": ["Multiple independent 2024-2025 systematic reviews and meta-analyses converge on statistically significant improvements in fasting blood sugar (SMD = -0.51; 95% CI -0.81, -0.20), HOMA-IR (SMD = -0.39), HbA1c, LDL-C, and IL-6 in adults with metabolic syndrome across 8-10 RCTs each, with GRADE-high evidence for FBS/insulin/HOMA-IR/HbA1c/LDL-C/TC.", "Intermittent fasting (TRE, ADF, ICR, 5:2) reduces body weight 2-4 kg and BMI ~1 kg/m² versus ad libitum or continuous energy restriction controls in overweight/obese adults (Zaman 2023, Liu 2023, 15-RCT meta-analysis 2025).", "Heterogeneity across IF trials is very high (I² up to 93.8%) driven by protocol variation (TRE windows 7-9 h vs 8 h vs 5:2 vs ADF), population mix (MetS vs obese vs T2DM vs NAFLD), and short intervention durations (mostly 1-16 weeks).", "A recent US epidemiological analysis (American Heart Association EPI/Lifestyle 2024 abstract) linked 8-hour time-restricted eating to 91% higher cardiovascular mortality risk — a major contradiction with the short-term RCT benefit signal.", "All read evidence is SHORT-TERM (≤16 weeks): no RCT in the accumulated knowledge extends to one year or longer; long-term safety, mortality, and sustainability are unstudied in the read set."], "perspective_gaps": ["Historical", "Regional", "Emerging_Trends", "Regulatory", "Industry", "Economic"], "web_queries": ["American Heart Association 2024 time-restricted eating 91% cardiovascular mortality abstract EPI Lifestyle", "FDA dietary intervention intermittent fasting position statement regulatory guidance therapeutic claim", "GLP-1 receptor agonist semaglutide versus intermittent fasting metabolic syndrome head-to-head comparison real world", "intermittent fasting long-term adherence dropout rate 12 months pragmatic trial metabolic syndrome", "Ramadan fasting historical biomedical research timeline Longo Mattson Panda foundational studies", "intermittent fasting app Zero Fastic market size revenue subscription 2024 commercial wellness industry report"], "academic_queries": ["\"intermittent fasting\" \"metabolic syndrome\" long-term adverse events cardiovascular mortality cohort", "time-restricted eating circadian misalignment mechanism randomized controlled trial biomarker", "intermittent fasting cost-effectiveness QALY health economic evaluation type 2 diabetes prevention"], "exa_queries": ["landmark 2024 2025 clinical trials showing intermittent fasting harm null results cardiovascular"], "convergence_assessment": "expanding", "should_continue": true, "reasoning": "Only 4 of 6 pages yielded substantive content (2 were paywall shells). All read evidence is short-term efficacy from overlapping meta-analyses. Three STORM perspectives (Historical, Regional, Emerging_Trends) remain entirely uncovered, and three more (Regulatory, Industry, Economic) are marked low-coverage. A critical contradiction — the AHA 2024 91% CV-mortality signal vs the short-term benefit meta-analyses — must be resolved before synthesis. Confidence is MEDIUM: strong on short-term metabolic markers, WEAK on long-term safety, regulatory framing, cost-effectiveness, and mechanism depth.", "knowledge_gaps": ["Long-term (>12 month) intermittent fasting safety, mortality, and adherence — no evidence in the read set beyond 16 weeks", "Cardiovascular mortality signal from 2024 AHA abstract: magnitude, population, protocol, and whether peer-reviewed full paper exists", "Head-to-head comparison of IF versus GLP-1 receptor agonists and structured diet programs for metabolic syndrome", "FDA/EMA regulatory positions on IF as a therapeutic intervention and any enforcement actions against commercial IF products", "Cost-effectiveness (QALY, ICER) of IF specifically (not generic lifestyle) for metabolic syndrome prevention/management", "Mechanism differentiation: which benefits are driven by circadian alignment versus total caloric reduction", "Pediatric, elderly, pregnant, and lean metabolic-syndrome populations — read set is almost entirely overweight/obese mid-age adults", "Historical origins — Ramadan physiology research and the Longo/Mattson foundational experiments are not yet in the read set"]}
